title: ElevenLabs API pricing — TTS minute tiers
html:
Yahir scoping ElevenLabs API pricing — Free 20 min / Starter $5 60 min / Creator $11 200 min / Pro $99 1000 min / Scale $330 4000 min / Business $1320 22000 min. Likely sourcing voice for a Brotein or feature.

elevenlabs · brotein · ai voice tooling
